data.current_summary: Delete any data stored by a plugin
data.summary_suggestion: Remove plugin-stored data for an integration
data.description_suggestion: Deletes all data stored by a specific plugin for a given integration. The plugin_type parameter specifies which plugin's data to delete, and integration_id identifies the integration instance. This operation permanently removes the plugin's stored data and cannot be undone. Returns a success confirmation. Requires authentication via OAuth Resource Owner Password Grant.

data.current_summary: Create the zapier integration with a specific integration ID
data.description_suggestion: Initializes and activates a Zapier plugin integration with the specified integration_id. The integration_id path parameter identifies the Zapier integration instance to configure. Request body contains Zapier-specific configuration parameters (e.g., API credentials, webhook settings). Returns the initialized Zapier integration object with connection status and available actions. This operation establishes the connection between GrooveApps and Zapier.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'Create' which is ambiguous - unclear if creating a new integration or initializing an existing one. Description is missing entirely. Improved summary to 'Initialize' for clarity. Added details about what integration_id specifies, what configuration parameters are expected, what is returned, and the side effect (establishes Zapier connection). This helps AI agents understand this is a setup/initialization operation specific to Zapier.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available component type plugins in the GrooveApps system. Returns an array of Plugin objects containing plugin metadata including name, identifier, and configuration details. Requires authentication via OAuth Resource Owner Password Grant flow. No filters or pagination parameters are applied - all component plugins are returned.

data.current_summary: Delete any data stored by a plugin
data.summary_suggestion: Remove plugin-stored data for an integration
data.description_suggestion: Deletes all data stored by a specific plugin for a given integration. The plugin_type parameter specifies which plugin's data to delete, and integration_id identifies the integration instance. This operation permanently removes the plugin's stored data and cannot be undone. Returns a success confirmation. Requires authentication via OAuth Resource Owner Password Grant.
